title: Build Week Public Demo Foundation Cards
fixtureDisclosure: Five sampled demo Cards per visible foundation family, plus the 18 Protocol/Skill Cards required by the Red, Blue, and Green public profile loadouts. The complete Hapa Card library is intentionally not included.

cards.title: Human Authority Gate
cards.summary: A consequential proposal waits for an explicit human decision.
cards.description: Place this Card before mint, publish, canon, deletion, or external delivery steps.
cards.lore: The bright gate stays closed until a named person chooses to cross it.
utility: Pause at consequential boundaries
Name the approving human
Record the decision without implying endorsement

equipRules: Equip when a workflow crosses a human authority boundary.
effects: Stops silent promotion of proposals.
limits: Does not grant authority.

cards.title: Source Before Claim
cards.summary: Attach a source and confidence boundary before a claim travels.
cards.description: Use a source reference, an evidence class, and a visible uncertainty statement.
cards.lore: Blue thread holds a statement to the place it came from.
utility: Bind sources
State uncertainty
Keep inference distinct from evidence

equipRules: Equip for research, synthesis, or publication.
effects: Makes claim lineage inspectable.
limits: A source can still be wrong.

cards.title: Consent Before Attachment
cards.summary: Names, media, and identity references require a bounded consent basis.
cards.description: Record why an attachment is allowed, what it may be used for, and how it can be removed.
cards.lore: Nothing becomes part of the deck merely because it was easy to pick up.
utility: Check consent
Bound permitted use
Preserve removal route

equipRules: Equip before attaching identity or media records.
effects: Keeps reuse permission visible.
limits: Presence is not consent.

cards.title: Reversible by Default
cards.summary: Prefer actions with a named rollback and repair owner.
cards.description: Before acting, state what can be undone, what cannot, and who owns recovery.
cards.lore: Red moves fastest when the return path is already lit.
utility: Name rollback
Identify irreversible parts
Assign repair owner

equipRules: Equip for state-changing operations.
effects: Makes recovery part of the plan.
limits: Some actions remain irreversible.

cards.title: Proposal Is Not Truth
cards.summary: Generated output remains a proposal until reviewed and accepted.
cards.description: Keep draft, reviewed, accepted, and canon states visually and mechanically distinct.
cards.lore: A bright possibility is still only a possibility.
utility: Label proposals
Separate review from acceptance
Prevent silent canonization

equipRules: Equip around generative or council workflows.
effects: Prevents proposal-to-truth collapse.
limits: Review does not guarantee acceptance.

cards.title: Formation Reading
cards.summary: Read Card order, role, and orientation as one explicit collaboration state.
cards.description: Inspect every slot before deriving shared context from a Formation.
cards.lore: Meaning changes when the same Cards change seats.
utility: Read ordered slots
Check orientation
Name missing roles

equipRules: Equip for Tarot Draw and Stargate work.
effects: Turns placement into readable context.
limits: Formation meaning remains bounded to its declared rules.

cards.title: Card Distillation
cards.summary: Turn a large work record into a compact, attributable Card.
cards.description: Preserve the source, decision, reusable move, and truth boundary while removing noise.
cards.lore: The small vessel remembers where the larger river came from.
utility: Extract reusable move
Preserve source link
State omitted scope

equipRules: Equip after a meaningful work turn.
effects: Creates a portable jump-off point.
limits: The Card does not replace its source.

cards.title: Render Truth Preflight
cards.summary: Check that a media claim matches the bytes and runtime that will actually ship.
cards.description: Verify source availability, output hashes, fallbacks, and public-path safety.
cards.lore: The screen may glow while the artifact is still missing.
utility: Verify artifacts
Inspect fallbacks
Check public paths

equipRules: Equip before packaging or publishing media.
effects: Exposes missing or substituted output.
limits: A passing preflight is not creative approval.

cards.title: Context Packing
cards.summary: Assemble the smallest source-complete context packet for the next task.
cards.description: Select only the relevant Avatar, Card, scene, song, and lineage references.
cards.lore: A useful pack carries enough to return, not the whole archive.
utility: Select relevant records
Keep provenance
Exclude unrelated private material

equipRules: Equip before handing work to another tool or agent.
effects: Reduces irrelevant exposure.
limits: Minimal does not mean source-free.

cards.title: Lineage Check
cards.summary: Trace an artifact back through revisions, sources, and responsible owners.
cards.description: Confirm stable IDs, parent links, source digests, and current custody before reuse.
cards.lore: Every return path begins with a thread that was not cut.
utility: Trace revisions
Confirm custody
Find missing links

equipRules: Equip before adapting or publishing an artifact.
effects: Makes provenance gaps actionable.
limits: Custody is not ownership or canon.

cards.title: Avatar Builder
cards.summary: Local-first workbench for Avatar Cards, media slots, decks, songs, and scenes.
cards.description: The public demo surface that owns this curated content volume.
cards.lore: A bright workshop where identities become reusable without becoming unbounded.
utility: Build Avatar Cards
Attach bounded media
Export context packs

equipRules: Equip as the active authoring workbench.
effects: Routes Avatar-shaped work.
limits: Prototype-stage surface.

cards.title: Stargate Table
cards.summary: A 3D Card Formation surface for deterministic collaboration context.
cards.description: Orders Cards, verifies custody, and derives a bounded Gate proposal.
cards.lore: The table does not choose the travelers; it makes their chosen order visible.
utility: Place Cards
Derive Formation
Review portable Context Card

equipRules: Equip for Formation-based collaboration.
effects: Turns Card order into reviewable context.
limits: A demo Gate is not a live invitation.

cards.title: Echo Director
cards.summary: A song-and-Card direction surface for turning music structure into editable visual plans.
cards.description: The public seed exposes three text-only Echo State Song Cards without private audio or media.
cards.lore: The conductor can show the score without giving away the entire archive.
utility: Read Song Cards
Plan visual beats
Preserve media lineage

equipRules: Equip for song visualization planning.
effects: Routes Song Cards into visual direction.
limits: No audio is bundled in the public demo.

cards.title: Card Forge
cards.summary: A small station for turning evidence and learned moves into typed Cards.
cards.description: Validates family, source, lifecycle, and reuse boundaries before a Card joins a deck.
cards.lore: Heat gives the Card shape; lineage keeps it from becoming a counterfeit memory.
utility: Choose Card family
Validate required fields
Record source lineage

equipRules: Equip while authoring reusable Cards.
effects: Creates typed reviewable artifacts.
limits: Forging does not canonize.

cards.title: Local Archive
cards.summary: A custody boundary for source records that should not all enter the public deck.
cards.description: Keeps private originals local while allowing intentionally minimized public derivatives.
cards.lore: The archive is useful because its door can stay closed while one attributed Card travels.
utility: Hold private source
Export minimized derivative
Retain return path

equipRules: Equip as the source-custody boundary.
effects: Supports minimized public exports.
limits: The public derivative does not transfer source ownership.

cards.title: Red Team Weakness Probe
cards.summary: How to attack a system for the common good.
cards.description: Convert suspected weakness into evidence, mitigation, and repair pressure.
cards.lore: Red-aligned avatars need a sanctioned way to test without becoming the threat.
utility: teach the avatar how to operate inside Hapa
anchor Genesis backstory and daily roleplay
create game-mechanic prompts for Garden, ship, and arena scenes
broadGameMechanics: Convert suspected weakness into evidence, mitigation, and repair pressure.

mediaAssets.name: Red Team Weakness Probe demo art

equipRules: Keep attached to Red's public profile loadout.
effects: Convert suspected weakness into evidence, mitigation, and repair pressure.
limits: does not authorize real system mutation by itself
must preserve source attribution and canon status

cards.title: Truth Lane Audit
cards.summary: How to separate verified fact, inference, lore, and speculation.
cards.description: Prevent game drama from corrupting repo truth or canon state.
cards.lore: Red pressure becomes useful only when Blue can verify it and Green can weigh its impact.
utility: teach the avatar how to operate inside Hapa
anchor Genesis backstory and daily roleplay
create game-mechanic prompts for Garden, ship, and arena scenes

cards.description: Turn dangerous action into scoped action with proof and rollback.
cards.lore: Red needs a ritual for power that can be audited.
utility: teach the avatar how to operate inside Hapa
anchor Genesis backstory and daily roleplay
